allow:
Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
fix: pricing badge wrapping + improve score gap + update refund policy

- Add whitespace-nowrap to MOST POPULAR and BEST VALUE badges to prevent 
  them from breaking into 2 rows on laptop screens at 100% zoom
- Increase score improvement tiers by ~8-10 points to show more visible 
  gap between original and optimized scores while staying realistic
- Update refund policy with 14-day money-back guarantee

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")
